description_long: This drone features a robust central body with a red and black color scheme, flanked by two large circular ducted fans on either side. The fans are encased in protective shrouds, likely to enhance safety and efficiency during flight in urban environments. The central fuselage houses what appears to be a camera or sensor module at the front, along with various electronic components and wiring visible on the top. The rear of the drone includes dual exhaust-like structures, possibly for cooling or propulsion assistance. Fixed landing legs extend downward, providing stable support when the drone is at rest. The overall design suggests a focus on stability, maneuverability, and safe operation in populated areas.
description: A red and black drone with two large ducted fans, protective shrouds, a front camera module, and fixed landing legs.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing both large ducted fans, the central red body, and visible electronics.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical body, rear exhausts, and the depth of the fan shrouds.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the camera module, symmetrical fan placement, and landing legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the rear exhausts and the overall compactness of the design.
